title: CIA station in Saudi capital hit in drone attack
summary_full: The attack on the CIA station in Riyadh comes as Iran widens retaliation across the Middle East in the wake of the U.S.-Israeli bombing campaign.
summary_public: The attack on the CIA station in Riyadh comes as Iran widens retaliation across the Middle East in the wake of the U.S.-Israeli bombing campaign.

SA.label: negative
SA.evidence: CIA station in Saudi capital hit in drone attack
